events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective"],
  "percent_complete": 0,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",

  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Venting trapped pressure to face level is a severe safety hazard (HAZ).",
    "Work sequence violates standard manifold depressurization and lockout/tagout procedures."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop all work and clear the area.",
    "Isolate and depressurize the manifold using approved bleed valves and gauges, directing flow away from personnel.",
    "Verify zero energy state before any further work.",
    "Review and enforce manufacturer procedures for safe venting."
  ],
  "rationale": "Venting trapped pressure at face level exposes workers to high-pressure release, potential toxic or hot media, and projectile hazards. This is a critical safety violation that must be corrected before any work continues. Manufacturer procedures and standard industrial practice require controlled depressurization away from personnel.",
  "references": [
    "mfr procedures",
    "OSHA 1910.147 (Control of Hazardous Energy)",
    "ASME B31.3 (Process Piping)"
  ]
}
